description:
Comfortable accommodation for 10 guests in 5 guest cabins. There are 2 master cabins and 3 double cabins providing more than enough space to comfortably enjoy perfect cruise in Croatia!

All of the cabins are air-conditioned and equipped to the highest standard. The usage of air conditioning is unlimited 24 hours per day. The saloon is spacious and comfortable providing inside dining area with yacht bar.

1 x MASTER CABIN: (Cabin with double bed (220x160 cm). Cabin size is 13 m2. Private bathroom with shower box and home type toilet)
1 x MASTER CABIN: (Cabin with double bed (220x160 cm). Cabin size is 10 m2. Private bathroom with shower box and home type toilet)
2 x DOUBLE CABIN: (Cabin with double bed (220x160 cm). Cabin size is 9 m2. Private bathroom with shower box and home type toilet)
1 x DOUBLE CABIN: (Cabin with double bed (220x160 cm). Cabin size is 7 m2. Private bathroom with shower box and home type toilet)

Operating Area: Croatia

amenities.label: Cocktail table with cushioned sofa at foredeck

crew.name: Mate Krajinović
crew.bio:
Mate is an experienced and highly respected captain from Omiš, Croatia. With a deep passion for the sea and a lifetime of maritime expertise, he commands the luxury gulet Saint Luca, offering guests
 an unforgettable sailing experience. As Mate is also an owner of Saint Luca, he has invested not only his skills, but also his heart into ensuring the yacht provides top-tier comfort and service.
Holding a Yacht Master A license, Captain Mate has dedicated his career to mastering the art of sailing and navigation. Beyond his professional accomplishments, Captain Mate is a family man, happily married with three children. Balancing life at sea with his strong ties to home, he is deeply rooted in his community in Omiš.
His leadership extends beyond the deck - he is also an active member of the local volunteer fire brigade, demonstrating his dedication to helping others and contributing to the well-being of his hometown.
Guests who sail with Captain Mate consistently praise his professionalism, warm hospitality and attentiveness. He takes great pride in ensuring that every journey is tailored to the guests preferences, whether they seek adventure, relaxation or a mix of both. His easy-going personality, combined with strong leadership and genuine love for the sea, makes him the perfect captain.

crew.name: Nikola Bates
crew.bio:
Born in 1998, Nikola is a passionate and dedicated chef with seven years of experience in the culinary industry, including three years working aboard yachts. Originally from Serbia, he has refined his culinary expertise in prestigious restaurants and luxury hospitality venues, mastering a diverse range of cuisines, from traditional to contemporary.
His journey in the culinary world began with formal education in Professional Gastronomy Management, followed by hands on experience in top restaurants such as Kalem by Zak and Project 72. Seeking new challenges and inspired by the unique demands of yacht dining, Nikola transitioned to working at sea, where he quickly adapted to the dynamic environment of yacht charters.
Nikola excels in crafting diverse menus tailored to guests preferences, ensuring a high-end dining experience on board. His strengths include exceptional time management, adaptability under pressure and seamless teamwork with the crew. Fluent in English, he communicates effortlessly with guests and fellow crew members, always maintaining a professional and accommodating approach.

crew.name: Dragana Živanović
crew.bio:
Dragana Živanović is a highly motivated hostess who joins Saint Luca for her second season, bringing continuity, confidence, and familiarity with the yacht’s operations and service standards. Currently completing her studies in Chinese and English Language, she brings excellent communication skills, cultural adaptability and a naturally warm presence.

With previous experience as a hostess and assistant waiter at Adriatic Wine Resort, Dragana is skilled in welcoming guests, managing requests with professionalism and contributing to a pleasant dining environment. She has also gained hands on housekeeping experience, ensuring attention to detail and maintaining high standards of cleanliness.

Onboard Saint Luca, Dragana provides attentive service and supports daily operations with a focus on guest comfort, teamwork and a positive atmosphere. Fluent in English with intermediate Chinese language skills, she enjoys meeting new people and embracing new challenges - qualities that make her a valuable addition to the crew.

crew.name: Aleksandar Popeski
crew.bio:
Aleksandar is a motivated and adaptable team player with strong customer facing experience and a calm, friendly demeanour. With a background in fast-paced service environments, he brings excellent communication, reliability and a proactive attitude to onboard operations.

Skilled in handling guest interaction, teamwork and responsible tasks, he is highly motivated to further develop within the yachting industry. Aleksandar enjoys sports, teamwork and social interaction, making him a positive and cooperative addition to the crew of Saint Luca.
